content.text:
## Image Description

The image is a **logo/branding graphic** for **"Model Context Protocol"** (commonly known as **MCP**).

### Details:

- **Background:** A solid, medium-to-bright **blue color** (approximately a cornflower or sky blue, similar to `#4A90D9` or similar hex value)
- **Logo Icon (left side):** A white abstract icon that resembles **two overlapping or intertwined rectangular/rounded shapes**, somewhat reminiscent of a stylized paper clip or linked connectors. It has a looping, continuous line design with rounded corners.
- **Text (right of icon):** The words **"Model Context Protocol"** are written in **bold, white, sans-serif font** — clean and modern in style
- **Layout:** The logo and text are **horizontally centered** on the image, slightly left of center overall
- **Aspect ratio:** Wider than tall (landscape orientation)

### Context:
**Model Context Protocol (MCP)** is an open standard developed by **Anthropic** (the AI company behind Claude) that enables AI models to securely connect to external data sources, tools, and services in a standardized way.
